## Checklist

- [ ] The entry has a clear workflow use case.
- [ ] Official source links are included.
- [ ] Good-fit and not-good-fit cases are clear.
- [ ] Setup or usage steps are included.
- [ ] Review steps are included.
- [ ] The matching category README was updated.
- [ ] The root README was updated if this is a major resource.
